name: Budding Seeds
description:
Summon a field of flowers which blooms after 6 seconds, healing you and allies in the area for 3485 Health.

While the field grows, you and allies are healed for 410 Health every 1 second.  

You can activate this ability again to cause it to instantly bloom.

An ally within the field can activate the Harvest synergy, healing for 3372 Health over 5 seconds.
